arts.ttl: ‘Already one of the best in the world’ - Messi full of praise for Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: If there’s anyone who knows what Lamine Yamal is going through as a left-footed prodigy who plays in Barcelona’s right wing at a very young age, that is Lionel Messi. And Leo is very impressed with what Lamine has already accomplished at such a young age, and thinks the sky is the limit for the teenage superstar.

arts.sum: Barcelona welcome Celta Vigo in La Liga hoping to increase their advantage in the title race over Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Inter could be without Thuram against Barcelona
arts.sum: With less than two weeks to go before their highly anticipated UEFA Champions League semifinal first-leg match against FC Barcelona, Inter Milan has been dealt what could prove a significant blow. Most crucially, Alejandro Balde is working towards being fit just in time for the first leg.
